resolutionDescription:
Video resolution (image quality)
Higher values improve image quality but increase network load
fpsDescription:
Frames per second
Higher values make video smoother but increase system load
casualModeDescription:
Balanced mode for image quality and stability
Works comfortably with a wide variety of games
lowLatencyModeDescription:
Low latency focused mode
Recommended for rhythm and fighting games
qualityModeDescription:
Quality focused mode
Higher resolution and FPS settings may reduce stability in action-heavy games
reducingNetworkLoadModeDescription:
Network load reduction focused mode
Lower resolution and FPS settings help maintain stability on unstable connections
averageBitrateDescription:
Average network bandwidth used during streaming
Higher values improve image quality
maxBitrateDescription:
Maximum network bandwidth
Temporarily increases image quality when the connection is stable
vbvBufferSizeDescription:
Video buffer size
Larger values improve stability but may increase latency
vbvInitialDelayDescription:
Initial playback buffer size
Larger values improve stability but delay playback start
gopLengthDescription:
Keyframe interval
Shorter values improve recovery but increase bandwidth usage
idrPeriodDescription:
Full refresh frame interval
Affects recovery from video corruption
repeatSpsPpsDescription:
Periodically sends stream information
Improves connection and recovery stability
outputAudDescription:
Adds frame boundary information
Improves compatibility and stability
maxRefFramesDescription:
Number of reference frames
Higher values improve image quality but increase load
presetGuidDescription:
Basic encoder preset
Controls the balance between speed, quality, and stability
Lower numbers prioritize lower latency and faster encoding
tuningInfoDescription:
Optimization for specific use cases such as low latency or high quality
Affects encoder behavior
enableLookaheadDescription:
Analyzes future frames to improve compression efficiency
May slightly increase latency
lookaheadDepthDescription:
How many future frames are analyzed
Higher values may improve image quality
disableIadaptDescription:
Disables automatic I-frame adjustment
Keeping this enabled is generally recommended
disableBadaptDescription:
Disables automatic B-frame adjustment
Keeping this enabled is generally recommended
alertInvalidModeName:
Invalid mode name
The following characters cannot be used:
\, /, :, ?, ", <, >, |
customModeNameConflictsWithOthers:
The mode you entered already exists
Please save it under a different name
failedToDeleteCustom: Failed to delete the custom mode
failedToUpdateCustom: Failed to update the custom mode
